title: Data-Driven Modeling and Optimization of a Modified Ludzack–Ettinger Process Using ML and DL for Effluent Quality Prediction
description: SpeakForWater Episode 4: Data-Driven Modeling and Optimization of a Modified Ludzack–Ettinger Process Using ML and DL for Effluent Quality Prediction. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
